text:
notion MCP: all 22 tools have camelCase names.

fix CLI renamed all 22 in 0.2 seconds.

before: appendBlockChildren
after: append_block_children

grade went from F to D-. still bad. but less embarrassing.

context7 MCP scored 9.5/100. the lowest grade we've seen.

ran the fix CLI. output: F → F (31.2).

automated naming fixes don't help when the whole schema is behavioral instructions masquerading as descriptions.

ran the fix CLI on 10 F-grade MCP servers.

best result: grafana F → D. worst: context7 stays F.

automated fixes get you to "not embarrassing". actually good requires someone caring.
